title: SingleMacePlus
description: Only ONE Mace can be crafted per server.
body:
# SingleMacePlus (Paper / Purpur / Spigot 1.21+)

> **SingleMacePlus** is a lightweight server plugin that enforces a simple rule: **only one Mace can ever be crafted on the server**.
> After the first craft, the Mace recipe result disappears (so players can’t craft another), and the plugin can announce important events both **in-game** and optionally to **Discord** via a webhook.

> Designed for **Paper / Purpur 1.21+**.

## Key Features

- **One Mace per server**
  - The first Mace craft is allowed.
  - After that, the Mace crafting result is hidden/removed, effectively preventing further crafting.

- **First craft announcement**
  - Broadcasts a message to all players.
  - Plays a global sound effect.

- **Ownership tracking (pickup-based)**
  - Tracks the current Mace owner when the unique Mace is picked up from the ground.
  - If a different player picks it up, it announces an ownership change.
  - If the same owner drops and picks it up again, no message is sent.

- **Discord webhook integration (optional)**
  - Sends selected announcements to Discord using a webhook URL.
  - You can configure different text for Minecraft vs Discord.

- **Admin reset command**
  - Reset the “already crafted” state and owner UUID.
